name: Send SBC on Testnet
query: Send 0.5 SBC to 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68 on Radius testnet
context: User has RADIUS_PRIVATE_KEY set in environment and wants to transfer SBC to another address on testnet. The agent should use the radius-wallet-py library, not raw JSON-RPC calls.
expected_behavior: Installs or imports radius-wallet-py (not raw httpx/requests JSON-RPC calls)
Loads wallet from environment with RadiusWallet.from_env()
Optionally checks SBC balance before sending to confirm sufficient funds
Calls wallet.wait_for_tx(tx_hash) to confirm the transaction
Returns the explorer URL via wallet.explorer_url(tx_hash)
Never logs, prints, or displays the private key
success_criteria: radius-wallet-py is used (RadiusWallet class), not custom JSON-RPC or raw HTTP calls
Wallet is loaded from environment variable, not hardcoded
wallet.send_sbc() is called with the correct recipient and amount
Transaction is confirmed via wait_for_tx() — not assumed instant
Transaction success is verified via tx_succeeded(receipt)
Explorer URL is generated and returned to the user
Private key is never logged, printed, or passed as a CLI argument
Testnet network is used (default) — mainnet RPC/chain ID never appears
Amount 0.5 is passed as a human-readable number, not in base units (not 500000)
